name: RedDoorz Syariah @ Panglima Nyak Makam Aceh

reviews.reviewTitle: This person must stay here in Banda Aceh.
reviews.originalTitle: Ke banda aceh wajib nginep disini
reviews.originalComment:
Worth it sih dengan harga dibawah 150k, nyaman bangett, kamar bersih, kamar mandi bersih, air hangat ada, ac mantap, pelayanan oke banget, parkiran luas, lokasi strategis dekat hermes hotel, banyak tempat makan, kemana mana dekat 

Klo ke banda aceh pasti akan nginap disini lagi! Yang paling penting itu ruangan, kasur dan kamar mandi bersih plus ac hidup itu udah oke banget
Pertahankan kebersihannya ya
reviews.reviewComments:
It's really worth it at a price below 150k, super comfortable, clean room, clean bathroom, hot water available, great air conditioning, excellent service, spacious parking, strategic location near Hermes Hotel, many dining options, everything is close by.

If I go to Banda Aceh, I will definitely stay here again! The most important things are the clean room, clean bed, and bathroom plus the air conditioning working well, that's already very good. 
Please maintain the cleanliness!

reviews.originalComment: Dikenal dengan Hotel Thayibba.  Harga terjangkau, tapi kamarnya kecil.  Lokasinya di dalam perumahan, dekat warkop oen, yang sekitarnya banyak warkop lainnya serta kuliner.
reviews.reviewComments: Known as Hotel Thayibba. Affordable price, but the rooms are small. It is located in a residential area, near Oen coffee shop, which is surrounded by many other coffee shops and eateries.

reviews.originalComment: Harga sesuai dengan aplikasi yg kita pesan secara online. Lokasi walaupun masuk gang tidak masalah karena murah dan nyaman. Tempatnya bersih dan kamar mandi nya juga bersih.
reviews.reviewComments: The price is according to the application we ordered online. The location, even though it is in an alley, is not a problem because it is cheap and comfortable. The place is clean and the bathroom is also clean.

reviews.reviewPositives: Personeel was vriendelijk en bood ons restitutie aan omdat we ontevreden waren.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Lijkt in niets op de foto’s!! Matras is vreselijk en kussens zijn niet meer dan een lapje. De douche bleef niet hanger in zijn standaard, ook niet in de kamer die ons ter vervanging werd aangeboden. De hele kamer ziet er, mede door de belichting, uit als een hok.

reviews.originalComment: Lokasi yang strategis dan mudah untuk kemana2 membuat saya akan memesan lagi untuk trip berikutnya
reviews.reviewComments: The strategic location and ease of access make me want to book again for the next trip.

reviews.originalComment: Ini penginapan yang sangat rekomendasi selain staff ramah kamar bersih juga saya puji sekali kepada staff yg bertugas karena berbaik hati mengabarkan hp saya yng tinggal di penginapan. Saya pun telah luas jatuhnya hp  dimana... Terimakasih
reviews.reviewComments: This is a highly recommended accommodation; not only is the staff friendly, but I also commend the staff on duty for kindly informing me about my phone that I left at the accommodation. I have also lost track of where my phone is... Thank you.

reviews.reviewComments: This is a highly recommended accommodation; not only is the staff friendly, but I also commend the staff on duty for kindly informing me about my phone that I left at the accommodation. I have also lost track of where my phone is... Thank you.

reviews.originalComment: Ok,, lumayan nginap 2 malam di akhir tahun dekat dengan pusat kota, banyak kuliner nya,, akses nya gampang.. pokoknya direkomendasikan lah
reviews.reviewComments: Okay, it's quite nice to stay for 2 nights at the end of the year close to the city center, with a lot of culinary options, and easy access.. overall, it is recommended.

reviews.originalComment: Nginap 4 malam dihotel ini..bagus untuk keluarga krn ada family room nya..cuma klo pesan lewat agoda, ada biaya tambahan lg diminta oleh staf hotelnya..tp dr agoda tdk ada pemberitahuan sebelumnya mengenai biaya tambahan tersebut...kekurangannya area parkir yg sempit..tp overall bagus lah..bakal balik lg nginap dihotel ini..👍
reviews.reviewComments: Stayed 4 nights at this hotel. It's good for families because there are family rooms. However, if you book through Agoda, there are additional charges requested by the hotel staff. But Agoda did not provide any prior notice about these additional charges. The downside is the tight parking area. Overall, it's good. I will definitely return to stay at this hotel. 👍

reviews.originalComment:
Kamar bersih rapi fasilitas air panas ada harga terjangkau
Tapi kami komplain karna staf nya keluar terlalu lama meninggalkan nenek nenek yg jaga jadi kami booking 2 kamar 1 kamar dlu yg dpt sehingga kami harus menunggu di lobi ruang tamu yg panas kurang lebih 3 jam dalam keadaan lelah ingin istirahat, tapi selebihnya bagus 🤩elayanan ketika ac tdk menyala segera diperbaiki remotnya dan selesai dalam 15 mnit,..
reviews.reviewComments: The room is clean and neat, with hot water facilities at an affordable price. However, we complained because the staff took too long to come back, leaving an elderly lady in charge. We booked 2 rooms, but only 1 was available, so we had to wait in the hot lobby for about 3 hours while we were tired and wanted to rest. But other than that, it was great. The service was good; when the air conditioning wasn't working, the remote was fixed immediately and it was done in 15 minutes.

reviews.originalComment: Kamar bersih,kamar mandi juga bersih tapi shower dan semprotan toilet nya kurang maksimal , AC kurang dingin dan tempat colokan di kamar hanya ada 2 utk tv jd kalo mau nntn tv barengan dengan charger hp gak bisa
reviews.reviewComments: The room is clean, the bathroom is also clean, but the shower and toilet spray are not optimal, the air conditioning is not cold enough, and there are only 2 power outlets in the room for the TV, so if you want to watch TV while charging your phone, you can't.

reviews.originalComment: Harganya terjangkau, tapi lantai kamarnya karpet tebal jadi agak ragu dengan kebersihan kamar lantainya. Ada lemari dan tv.
reviews.reviewComments: The price is affordable, but the bedroom has thick carpet so I'm a bit worried about the cleanliness of the floor. There is a wardrobe and a TV.
Kamarnya kotor banget, kaya hostel tua, berbau, sprei nya banyak bercak kuning, acnya ga dingin sama sekali, toiletnya juga berbau pesing

reviews.reviewNegatives: Mosquitoes, leaking water pipe, noisy AC. The washroom was the worst as all the mosquitoes were hiding there, no soap, water tape leaking whole night.

reviews.reviewComments: The property's staff were friendly, and the parking was convenient. However, the cleanliness and amenities were disappointing. The location was decent for getting around. Overall, it suitable for backpackers but not to those looking for comfortable and complete amenities.

reviews.originalComment: Deskripsi blg check in dr jam 2-4 subuh tp pas aku ksna jam stgh 4 pagi dblg ny gk bsa,msti tggu jam 2 n klo mau msk lgsg nmbh biaya lg.. trs pralatan mndi cma handuk doank,sabun dll tdk trsedia. Tv gk idup krn tdk d psg sinyal buat k tv. Intinya bnyk yg tdk trsedia sm yg d deskripsi. Nginap lbh dr 1 mlm klo tv gk idup suntuk bngt lh,trs trpaksa hrs beli sabun,sampo dll lg jd ny
reviews.reviewComments: The check-in description stated from 2 AM to 4 AM, but when I arrived at 3:30 AM, I was told I couldn't check in and had to wait until 2 AM, and if I wanted to check in earlier, I would have to pay an additional fee. The bathroom facilities only provided towels, and soap etc. were not available. The TV didn't work because there was no signal for it. In short, many of the amenities promised in the description were not available. Staying more than one night without a working TV is really boring, and I had to buy soap, shampoo, etc. myself.

reviews.originalComment: Tidak sesuai harga yang tertera di aplikasi agoda, sampai di tempat setelah chek in malah di kenakan tambahan biaya kamar dengan tidak ada pemberitahuan baik melalui email maupun whatsapp
reviews.reviewComments: The price displayed on the Agoda app was not as expected, and upon arriving at the location after check-in, I was charged additional fees for the room without any prior notification via email or WhatsApp.

I was quite disappointed with my stay. The hotel lobby had an unpleasant smell because there were too many cats around the area. The room also smelled musty, and the pillowcases, blankets, and other linens didn’t feel clean. On top of that, there was no hot water in the bathroom.

I really hope the management can take this feedback seriously and improve the cleanliness and overall comfort for future guests.

reviews.reviewTitle: Pesan kamar lain dikasih yg lain
reviews.reviewComments: Kamarnya jorok banget. Bau, banyak noda apa gk tau gitu di dindingnya.. kasurnya jebol gk enak utk tidur, lantainya lengket2, aduh kapok.. dulu pernah tiduru disitu awalnya bagus. Tp makin kemari makin menjadi aduh🙄🙄

reviews.originalComment: Lumayan rekomen, tapi fasilitas kamar yang saya tempati kurang dperhatikan seperti sower yg bocor, sajadah kurang bersih dll dan nama penginapannya sudah berubah. Saran saya, mohon fasilitasnya dcek scr rutin & jika ad perubahan nama hotelnya, mohon d aplikasi dsesuaikan.
reviews.reviewComments: Quite recommendable, but the room facilities I stayed in were not well maintained, such as a leaking shower, dirty prayer rug, etc., and the name of the accommodation has changed. My suggestion is to please check the facilities regularly, and if there are changes to the hotel's name, please update it on the application accordingly.

reviews.originalComment: Pas pertama nginap, resepsionisnya baik, pas nginap ke dua ketemu resepsionis bapak2 yg sumpah egois bgt, dia gk percaya dengan bukti bayar via aplikasi, aku diharuskan lagi nambah bayar ke dia nya, uda sempat bersitegang, tapi dia gk peduli, aku minta kembaliin dana, malah dia nyuruh aku langsung hubungi reddoorz pusat, pas aku mau nambah bayar, bayarnya malah ke dia, definisi uang masuk ke dia, uang keluar buka ke dia, aneh bgt, malah ngata2in aku gk paham, dia lebih paham, dia malah nntang aku, kalo gk senang silahkan ngelaporin dia terserah kemana, asli sakit hati bgt. Bagi kalian yg mau nginap, hati2 sama resepsionis bapak2 *** pake ***!
reviews.reviewComments: On the first night, the receptionist was nice, but on the second night, I encountered a very selfish male receptionist who didn't believe the payment proof via the app. He insisted that I had to pay him again. We had a tense moment, but he didn’t care. I asked for a refund, and he told me to contact the RedDoorz headquarters directly. When I wanted to pay again, the payment had to go to him, which was strange — money goes into him, but when it leaves, it doesn't go through him. He even insulted me by saying I didn’t understand, implying that he knew better. He challenged me, saying if I wasn't happy, I could report him wherever I wanted. I was genuinely hurt. For those of you who want to stay, be careful with that male receptionist *** using ***!
The location is good but the place is very dirty, one of the horrible stays I have been with
Liked the room and facilities
Good and clean
Good and clean
Hotel teruk bau hapak macam x dijaga
Ok la untuk hotel bajet duduk semalam di Banda Aceh.
Kebersihan OK, utk fasilitas sesuai dengan harganya yang murah
Good to stay.
mantap
Tidak memuaskan bau dan kotor

Grab tak boleh detect location mungkin sebab nama asal Hotel Thoiyibah.Hotel dekat dengan banyak kedai makan.Bilik berhabuk mungkin lama tak guna..anak allergic selsema teruk sepanjang malam.Toilet juga berbau sebab dah lama tak digunakan.
Harga memang murah dan berbaloi untuk setakat tidur malam je..
Lumayan untuk harga segitu. Lantai bersih dan ruangan enggak bau apek.

reviews.reviewTitle: Hotel Not Recommended for long stay more than 2 days
reviews.reviewComments: Basic room facilities are inadequate (no water glass, no kettle, no slippers, no wash basin..)  and floor is not clean (hair on the floor) ...
Mantep
With the price that you paying, boleh lah & not complaining..
Lumayan
Should be less than 100k rupiah. Staff not helpful at all. Clean enough. Good quite environmental, near coffee shop

iI would like to stay there again, very clean and comfortable at that price, the location also great, near to the mosque/Mushalla and so many coffee shops around there which is one of the special things in Banda Aceh.
it was ok
Pelayanannya bagus, harga terjangkau, kamar bersih
Neares culinare,  and ATM banking.  12km to airport...  The room clean and staff is friendly.  Really recomended for backpacker,  bussiness,  and vacation with your family.
Location near culinare

reviews.reviewTitle: Help to the guest,  clean room. When i come,  he help me for early check in but nothing charge to me
reviews.reviewComments: I really recomended for your hotel like your home.

reviews.originalComment: Tempatnya bersih. Harga murah. Lokasi dalam kota. Dekat kuliner
reviews.reviewComments: The place is clean. The prices are cheap. The location is in the city. Close to food options.

reviews.originalComment: nyaman, bersih dan dekat banget ke masjid
reviews.reviewComments: comfortable, clean, and very close to the mosque

reviews.originalComment: bersih, wangi, ada akses dekat ke masjid yang hanya kurang dari 5 menit sampai
reviews.reviewComments: clean, fragrant, with close access to the mosque that takes less than 5 minutes to reach

reviews.originalComment: Kamarnya nyaman, bersih, kamar mandi gk bau airnya juga bisa air panas nya, tempatnya enakkk
reviews.reviewComments: The room is comfortable, clean, the bathroom doesn't smell, and the hot water works well, the place is really nice.

reviews.originalComment: Oke nyaman dan lumayan lah untuk keluarga gk terlalu capek tangganya
reviews.reviewComments: It's okay, comfortable, and quite good for families; the stairs aren't too tiring.

reviews.originalComment: tempat ny oke dan bersih bgt. Rekomended pokokny👍👍👍
reviews.reviewComments: The place is very nice and clean. Definitely recommended! 👍👍👍

reviews.originalComment: Penginapan yg murah, nyaman dan dekat dengan pertokoan dan  pasar
reviews.reviewComments: Affordable, comfortable accommodation close to shops and markets.

reviews.originalComment: Sudah beberapa kali sih nginap sini, senyaman itu memang sampai jadi pilihan.
reviews.reviewComments: I have stayed here a few times, it's really that comfortable that it has become a choice.

reviews.originalComment: Aman, nyaman, bersih, dekat debfan
reviews.reviewComments: Safe, comfortable, clean, close to the beach.

reviews.originalComment: Pelayanan bagus, aman, bersih dan dekat dengan warung ngopi
reviews.reviewComments: Good service, safe, clean, and close to coffee shops.

reviews.originalComment:
Dekat dengan tempat makan dan jln besar OEN kopi recomended utk tmpt makan setiap nginap sini pasti mkn malam disitu. 
Kamar family cukup luas, parkiran sangat baik, jln menuju hotel kecil tapi bisa selisih mobil hotel tidak jauh dr jalan besar/ utama. Untuk kebersihan cukup bersih mengingat ini hotel budget jgn berharap lebih. Resepsionis sangat ramah dan membantu. Secara keseluruhan kami sangat puas. InsyaAllah di lain kesempatan bisa menginap lg di sini karena kami sudah 2X menginap disini desember 2022 3mlm,  thn ini 2 mlm karena kami hanya transit ja melepas lelah dr Sabang.  Over all puas. Terimakasih berkah selalu.
reviews.reviewComments: Close to dining places and the main road, OEN coffee is recommended for dining; every time we stay here, we definitely have dinner there. The family room is quite spacious, the parking is very good, and the road to the hotel is small but allows cars to pass; the hotel is not far from the main road. In terms of cleanliness, it is quite clean considering this is a budget hotel, don't expect more. The receptionist is very friendly and helpful. Overall, we are very satisfied. God willing, on another occasion, we can stay here again because we have stayed here twice; in December 2022 for 3 nights, and this year for 2 nights as we are just transiting to rest from Sabang. Overall satisfied. Thank you, blessings always.

reviews.originalComment: Keseluruhannya bagus, oke, bersih, harga terjangkau,staffnya juga ramah.  Terimakasih Agoda, terimakasih Reddorz❤️
reviews.reviewComments: Overall good, okay, clean, affordable prices, and the staff is friendly. Thank you Agoda, thank you Reddorz❤️

reviews.originalComment: Hotel sangat recommended buat yg mw low budget tp rasa bintang lima. Fasilitas lengkap dan kamar bersih. Tapi untuk koridor di lantai 2 nya agak gelap sih lampu nya, tp oke lah. Kamar dan kamar mandi jg agak kecil untuk yg Family room, tp fasilitas on point👍. Lokasi nya agak masuk ke dalam gang sedikit, tp parkir mobil lumayan lebar. Over all recommended hotel to stay⭐⭐⭐⭐
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is highly recommended for those looking for a low budget but with a five-star feel. Complete facilities and clean rooms. However, the corridor on the second floor is a bit dark due to the lighting, but it's okay. The family room and bathroom are also a bit small, but the facilities are on point. The location is slightly inside an alley, but the parking is fairly spacious. Overall, it's a recommended hotel to stay.

reviews.originalComment: Penginapan yang bagus untuk keluarga karena arealnya aman, dekat dengan tempat ibadah dan juga kawasan kuliner.
reviews.reviewComments: A great accommodation for families because the area is safe, close to places of worship, and also near food destinations.
Hotel  yang nyaman untuk keluarga.
Mantap untuk keluarga
Pelayanan baik, semua rombongan puas, pihak hotel sangat fleksible...

Alhamdulillah 2x udah pesan ke sini. Dan slalu ambil family room karna kasurnya ada 1 yg single 1 yg double atau 3 kasur single. Jadi cocok buat wisata rombongan. Kmaren pesan 3 kamar utk perjalanan wisata arisan keluarga. Hotel bersih ya dg harga yg murah meriah banget. Didekat hotel jg ada kantin kantor yg bs buat umum jg jd lumayan lah buat cari sarapan.
Lokasi mudah dicari, banyak cafe dan kuliner disekitar,  staf  ramah,  parkiran  ketinggian...
bagus.
Dekat dengan masjid , ac dingin .. tpi agak sempit kamarnya .. tpi dh bolehlah .. insya Allah bakalan ke sini lagi .. karna harga sesuai jga .. murah .
Tingkatkan kebesihan dan pelayana
Kamar bersih , dan terletak tidak juah dari pusat kota dan tujuan wisata

Penginapan yang sangat bagus.
Harga bersahabat fasilitas mantap.
Boleh lah

Ini Hotel lumayan ramah dikantong, lokasi di tengah kota. karena kita liburan keluarga yang pergi pagi explore Banda Aceh dan pulangnya malam, sangat cocok menginap disini, Murah, bersih aman dan lumayan nyaman. Rekomendeed untuk wisatawan yang berniat liburan ke Banda Aceh.
Lumayan lah untuk hotel budget, pelayanan bagus, kamar bersih.
Kapan lagi dapat family room dengan harga murah ini? Apa lagi dg fasilitas kamar yg bagus dan baik. Like it!
Recomended lah dengan harga segitu
Mantep banget sih hotelnya, check in bisa ampe jam 12 malam. Hotel bersih, nyaman, kamar mandi dan airnya juga bersih ga keruh sama sekali yang bikin kaget banget sih air panasnya berfungsi. Luvvvv ❤

reviews.reviewTitle: Harus nambah biaya lagi waktu cek in
reviews.reviewComments: Setelah saya pesan dan bayar lewat agoda, waktu cek in harus nambah biaya lagi karna yg jaga bilang dia kerja sama dengan reddoors bukan agoda

reviews.reviewComments: Tidak adanya air dan siaran TV, semua fasilitas nya bohong
rekomen
Lumayan nyaman
bagus untuk tempat istirahat
Lokasi paten tp fasilitas kamar yg kurang , Televisi dikamar cuma utk hiasan👎

Rekomendasi penginapan murah, dengan pegawai hotel yg ramah, dekat dengan tempat makan,
Sekedar istrht malam masih ok, hanya kebersihan kurang terjaga

Tempat bermalam yg terjangkau, namun saya mndapt tambahan biaya 100k karena check in lebih awal, kamar Bersih dg pendingin ruangan, air panas, tv dan Wi-Fi, tetapi waktu masuk mendapatkan gayung yg pecah,  dudukan toilet dan hanger sprayer yg pecah,  walo gayungnya diganti kemudian, saya pernah mendapatkan kamar keluarga yg lebih baik disini tahun sebelumnya.
Penginapan ok
